regions.text: Self-serving restaurants reduce the need for waitresses and save time. The AUTOMAT is a great example of this.
Food is kept in boxes with glass doors. You look at the food, put in money, and the door unlocks for you.
After you take your food and shut the door, fresh supplies are put in as the boxes are emptied.
(Illustrations: Using an Automat—looking at food, paying, and taking the meal). FUTURE: will empty. PRESENT: empty(ies). PAST: emptied.
